plugins.name: toulmin
plugins.description: Toulmin critical argumentation framework — plan→task→target→Gate1→verify→Gate2→code→debate→Gate3→regression. 8 skills: structured & vibe entries, L1-L4 verification (with L3.5 causal trace), R1-R3 adversarial debate (D1-D6 attack dimensions), external evidence audit via WebSearch, pre-mortem failure backtracking, unified qualifier synthesis, manual override with cooldown. L0-L2 drift detection with checkpoint protocol.
